title: Coarse Parallel Processing Using a Work Queue — Defining a Job
text:
Here is a manifest for a Job. You'll need to make a copy of the Job manifest
(call it
./job.yaml
),
and edit the name of the container image to match the name you used.
apiVersion
:
batch/v1
kind
:
Job
metadata
:
name
:
job-wq-1
spec
:
completions
:
8
parallelism
:
2
template
:
metadata
:
name
:
job-wq-1
spec
:
containers
:
-
name
:
c
image
:
gcr.io/<project>/job-wq-1
env
:
-
name
:
BROKER_URL
value
:
amqp://guest:guest@rabbitmq-service:5672
-
name
:
QUEUE
value
:
job1
restartPolicy
:
OnFailure
In this example, each pod works on one item from the queue and then exits.
So, the completion count of the Job corresponds to the number of work items
done. That is why the example manifest has
.spec.completions
set to
8
.
